title: juniperus deltoides var. spilinana
intro: Juniperus deltoides var. spilinana, also known as Rocky Mountain Juniper, is a variety of coniferous shrub or small tree native to the western United States. Its medicinal properties are attributed to its essential oils, which contain compounds like terpenes and flavonoids, and have been traditionally used to treat various health issues. The plant is said to have health benefits such as reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and relieving respiratory issues due to its antiseptic and expectorant properties. Herbal preparations of Juniperus deltoides var. spilinana include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to alleviate symptoms of colds, coughs, and skin conditions.
